squad.sensei: Kurikara (npc_a42aa521) — scarred war-vet, zero awe, demands he prove he's more than a bloodline and a liability
squad.graduated: Day 28 — headband earned, top practical marks

arcFlags.dustReframe: Day 3 — control comes free, Dust must be EARNED; failed forbidden solo reach unmade a patch of wall; Ryūen forbade unsupervised attempts for years.
arcFlags.particleFrame: Day 4 — Iwao learns Dust = simultaneity (three natures balanced at once), not sequence; the intellectual path, takes years.
arcFlags.trustWound: Day 5 — failed the tactics drill by treating teammates as variables; Akemi names it: he holds everyone at arm's length because he fears his own hands. Teamwork is his real growth edge before graduation/squad.
arcFlags.deferredAwakening: Day 23 — first sanctioned Dust attempt before Ōnoki FUMBLED (nat-1); the bloodline refused him; Ōnoki caught the backlash and gave the true key: hold the natures like a FRAME, not a fist — trust, not control (the same lesson as the cell). Dust ladder still NOT learned; the real awakening waits until he integrates 'trust the natures'. Convergence point: bloodline-mastery == the trust/teamwork arc.

relationships.family: Tsuru/Gennai/Mai bonds warming (dinner Day 1, defining beats)
relationships.akemi: closest friend; named his blind spot (Day 5): he won't trust teammates because he fears his own hands. The story's emotional anchor.
relationships.ganryu: rivalry seeded, disposition -1 ('the wind cut that leaf, not you')
relationships.romaru: wary respect after Day-2 spar (+1, 'you're not soft')
relationships.ryuen: mentor bond deepening (caught the Day-3 forbidden Dust reach; protective, fear-driven)

structure: A SHINOBI LIFE-SIM told as narrative manga. ONE CHAPTER PER DAY (chapters/dayNNN.md), authored BY HAND, PURE NARRATIVE (no inline mechanics — engine truth lives HERE in ledger.json). Each day is narrated HOUR BY HOUR with AT LEAST 10 beats (## time-stamped scene headers walking the daily schedule: wake/molding, breakfast/family, commute, the class periods, breaks, lunch, sensei training/sparring, downtime, dinner, evening, sleep). Played moment-to-moment (single engine calls; BATCH only for combat setup/utility, never to time-skip). Mechanically-significant beats are engine-grounded (checks/casts/spars/rests/level-ups); the rest is life-sim texture (relationships, habits, the small accumulations). AFTER EACH DAY: update docs/index.html + commit + push so the live Pages site follows in real time. Mandate: run continuously ~100 days / through the arc before reporting back.
progression: XP system added to engine (commit 69ceb9f): award_xp earns XP scaled small->large for engine-grounded beats; auto-levels at thresholds. L1->L2 on Day 8 (first week, 200 XP) lifted HP 8->14, Chakra 14->23 — easing the glass-cannon. Note: jutsuKnownCap still 3 at L2 (Ninjutsu Specialist gains jutsu slots at later levels); to learn the Dust ladder he'll free a slot (jutsu_forget) or hit a cap-growth level.

renown.note: FAME — passive, drawn by the bloodline whether earned or not (engine 'reputation'); the unearned hype. NOT the point.

willOfStone.what: Iwagakure's Will of Fire: carry weight without breaking; never crush the people you carry it beside. DM-AWARDED only, for defining moments, scaled small(1)/medium(2-3)/large(4-5). Engine track: iwagakure FAVOR (cap 10). THIS is what Iwao earns.

awarded.moment: Ended the spar without crushing Rōmaru even at 2 HP — carried the heavier stone, didn't crush the one beside him.
Said 'help'; learned blind trust (3 then 5 steps); climbed to the quarry to seek the cost of his gift.
Mid-term eval: his plan FAILED under pressure, but he'd left gaps and trusted his cell — Akemi & Tobari covered the breach and they passed together. Succeeded by the creed, not by control.
Failed the awakening utterly before the Third Tsuchikage (nat-1) and did not break — stood in the wreck and asked to be taught.

policy: Kit all combat NPCs/adversaries with real jutsu loadouts at spawn; freeform only for improv (natural molding / technique synthesis). Missions begin a few in-story weeks in.
notes: Clean restart per steer. Another agent shares this repo/engine (durable NPC-agent layer, commit 7f3d9d1); reach new engine intents via submit_intent (this session's MCP controller schema is cached).
